standard_instructions.text: Pick up the red cube.
Put the blue cup on the right plate.
Move the plate forward.
Pick up the green book.
Put the green book on the left plate.
Put the white mug on the left plate and put the yellow and white mug on the right plate.
Move the red cube to the left.
Put the red cube on the right plate.
Pick up the blue pen.
Put the blue pen next to the red cube.
Put the blue pen on the left plate.
Move the right plate to the left.
Move the left plate to the right.
Pick up the red ball.
Put the red ball next to the blue pen.
Put the red ball on the right plate.
Move the right plate forward.
Put the white cup next to the yellow mug.
Put the white cup next to the blue pen.
Move the left plate to the right.
Pick up the yellow block.
Put the yellow block on the left plate.
Move the left plate forward.
Pick up the blue cube.
Put the blue cube next to the green book.
Put the blue cube on the right plate.
Put the blue cube next to the red cube.
Move the red cube to the left.
Pick up the white block.
Put the white block on the right plate.
Move the right plate to the left.
Pick up the yellow and white mug.
Put the yellow and white mug on the left plate.
Move the left plate forward.
Pick up the red cube.
Put the red cube next to the blue pen.
Put the red cube on the left plate.
Move the blue pen to the right.
Move the blue pen to the left.
Pick up the green cup.
Put the green cup on the right plate.
Pick up the blue pen.
Put the blue pen on the left plate.
Put the blue pen next to the yellow mug.
Move the right plate to the left.
Pick up the white mug.
Put the white mug next to the blue pen.
Move the left plate to the right.
Pick up the yellow block.
Put the yellow block next to the green cup.
Move the right plate forward.
Pick up the red ball.
Put the red ball on the left plate.
Move the left plate to the right.
Pick up the blue cube.
Put the blue cube next to the yellow mug.
Move the right plate to the left.
Pick up the green book.
Put the green book next to the blue cube.
Put the green book on the right plate.

paraphrases.text: Take the apple in your hand.
Lift the apple from the ground.
Take the apple from the table.
Pick up the apple right now.
Lift the apple with your mechanical arm.
Take the apple in your mechanical hand.
Grasp the apple with your robotic claw.
Secure the apple with your gripper.
Hold the apple tightly with your robotic fingers.

semantic_opposites.text: Move the small block to the left.
Move the small block to the right.
Pick up the blue sphere carefully.
Place the heavy tool on the table.
Remove the heavy tool from the table.

ood_sentences.text: I prefer spending time at the beach.
My favorite season is autumn.
The smell of freshly cut grass is nice.
I'm not a big fan of horror movies.
The city I live in has a lot of traffic.
My grandmother is a great cook.
The smell of old books is fascinating.
I love listening to classical music.
My favorite type of fruit is strawberries.
The sound of birds chirping is soothing.
Summer days are always too short.
I enjoy taking long walks in the park.
The smell of freshly baked cookies is amazing.
I'm really bad at playing the guitar.
My favorite type of exercise is swimming.
The smell of lavender is calming.
I love reading science fiction novels.
The sound of rain on the roof is relaxing.
I'm a big fan of Japanese cuisine.
The smell of freshly cut flowers is lovely.
My favorite type of music is jazz.
The smell of popcorn is addictive.
I love visiting museums on weekends.
The sound of ocean waves is mesmerizing.
I'm really good at playing chess.
My favorite type of vacation is a road trip.
The smell of freshly brewed coffee is invigorating.
I love watching old movies on TV.
The sound of children laughing is joyful.
I'm not a big fan of spicy food.
The smell of freshly cut hay is earthy.
My favorite type of car is a convertible.
The sound of a babbling brook is peaceful.
I love visiting art galleries on Saturdays.
The smell of freshly cleaned clothes is fresh.
I'm really bad at playing tennis.
My favorite type of flower is sunflowers.
The smell of freshly cut grass is invigorating.
I love reading historical fiction novels.
The sound of a piano playing in the background is soothing.
